pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly require concatenation, conversion to MP3, embedding ID3 metadata, and segment extraction (highlight clip).
Task description rigorously involves audio podcast mastering and metadata embedding.
Web search confirmed SOC 27-4011 specifically maps to Audio and Video Technicians, which directly applies to podcast audio assembly and mastering tasks.
Task operates entirely on podcast creation and distribution.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on completely synthetic audio data generated by `ffmpeg` lavfi sine wave filters to simulate podcast speech and music. The required output duration is ~70 seconds for the master and distribution copies, and ~15 seconds for the highlight clip. Specific ID3 metadata tags (Title='Episode 47: Market Analysis', Artist='The Finance Hour', Album='Season 3', Track=47) and specific file formats (16-bit WAV, 192kbps MP3) are explicitly verified. Notably, while the prompt requires the highlight clip to start exactly at the 20-second mark of the raw episode, the verifier only validates its duration (~15 seconds) and format, without checking its actual audio content or offset.
